WORKFLOW

v0.14.5.0
/office-hours → /plan-ceo-review → /plan-eng-review → /plan-design-review
build → /qa → /design-review → /review → /ship → /land-and-deploy → /retro

IDEATION & PLANNING

/office-hours YC brainstorming & idea validation — Startup and Builder modes
/autoplan Auto-review pipeline — runs CEO, design, and eng reviews sequentially
/plan-ceo-review Strategy review — scope expand, selective, hold, or reduce
/plan-eng-review Architecture, data flow, edge cases, test coverage
/plan-design-review Rate each dimension 0–10, then fix to reach 10
/design-consultation Full design system — typography, color, layout → DESIGN.md
/design-shotgun Generate multiple AI design variants, compare, and iterate

DEVELOPMENT

/browse Headless browser — navigate, click, fill forms, screenshot, verify
/connect-chrome Launch real Chrome with gstack side panel for live browsing
/investigate Root cause debugging — Iron Law: no fix without root cause
/design-html Convert approved AI mockup to production HTML/CSS
/learn Review, search, prune, and export cross-session learnings
/freeze <dir> Lock edits to one directory for the session
/unfreeze Remove edit restrictions, allow changes everywhere

TESTING & QA

/qa Find bugs, fix, commit, re-verify — Quick / Standard / Exhaustive
/qa-only Report-only QA — health score, screenshots, repro steps
/design-review Visual QA — spacing, hierarchy, AI slop. Before/after screenshots
/benchmark Performance regression detection — Core Web Vitals, load times
/cso Security audit — OWASP Top 10, STRIDE, secrets, supply chain
/setup-browser-cookies Import real browser cookies for testing auth pages

SHIP & REVIEW

/review Pre-merge PR review — SQL safety, trust boundaries, structure
/codex Adversarial 2nd opinion — review / challenge / consult modes
/ship Merge base, tests, review, version bump, changelog, PR
/land-and-deploy Merge PR, wait for CI/deploy, canary verify production
/canary Post-deploy monitoring — errors, regressions, screenshots
/setup-deploy One-time deploy platform config (Fly, Vercel, Render, etc.)
/document-release Post-ship — sync README, ARCHITECTURE, CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG
/retro Weekly eng retro — commit analysis, work patterns, team breakdown

SAFETY

/careful Safety warnings before rm -rf, DROP TABLE, force-push, etc.
/guard Maximum safety — destructive command warnings + directory lock

META

/gstack-upgrade Upgrade gstack to the latest version
Generated from SKILL.md frontmatter · bun run gen:cheatsheet
